name: Pack Horse
bonus: Increased carrying capacity. Calm and dependable. A steady companion that will carry everything you can throw at it.
quirks: Calm, dependable, never panics or complains
description: Plain brown and calm. Never panics, never complains. A steady companion that will carry everything you can throw at it.
playstyleTip: Perfect for careful hoarders or players who want reliability over flair.

name: War Horse
bonus: Will fight alongside you if battle is outside but at the risk of item loss if the horse takes too much damage.
quirks: Slow to anger, respected by villagers, feared by foes
description: Tall, muscular, and imposing. Respected by villagers and feared by less disciplined foes. Slow to anger, but immensely strong.
playstyleTip: Great for players who anticipate physical challenges or enjoy a commanding presence.

name: Enchanted Friesian
bonus: Imbued with subtle elemental magic. Roll 1 extra dice and discard dice of your choice on LUCK rolls
quirks: Intelligent, reacts to spells, may be startled by chaotic magic
description: Sleek, black, and imbued with subtle elemental magic. Moves with a grace that hints at intelligence and awareness.
playstyleTip: A magical companion for players who want both capacity and a “living magic tool.”

name: Fae Courser
bonus: Easily spooked but you will never be without magic while you travel with this horse.
quirks: Easily spooked; may bolt or refuse orders on a bad LUCK roll. Thrives in mystical or wild environments
description: Chestnut with a mane that glimmers faintly in sunlight. Bold, playful, and fey in temperament—rider must earn its trust.
playstyleTip: Risk/reward choice. Adds excitement and potential bonuses, but requires care and attention.
